pageDescription: Sign in to your FastIPTV account to access your personalized dashboard and manage your subscriptions.
heroDescription: Sign in to your account to continue enjoying unlimited entertainment with FastIPTV.

list.title: Secure Account
list.description: Your data is protected and encrypted

questions.question: I forgot my password. How can I reset it?
questions.answer: Click on 'Forgot password?' link above and enter your email address. We'll send you a reset link.

questions.question: Can I use my account on multiple devices?
questions.answer: Yes! You can use your FastIPTV account on up to 5 devices simultaneously.

questions.question: How do I change my subscription plan?
questions.answer: After signing in, go to your dashboard and select 'Manage Subscription' to upgrade or downgrade your plan.

questions.question: Is my payment information secure?
questions.answer: Absolutely! We use industry-standard encryption to protect all your personal and payment information.
